body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/101503193?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/RainSignal", "id": 101503193, "login": "RainSignal", "node_id": "U_kgDOBgzQ2Q", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/RainSignal", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-119", "name": "Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer"}], "description": "Affected version of this crate had implementation of `From<&mut AsciiStr>` for `&mut [u8]` and `&mut str`. This can result in out-of-bounds array indexing in safe code.\n\nThe flaw was corrected in commit [8a6c779](https://github.com/tomprogrammer/rust-ascii/pull/63/commits/8a6c7798c202766bd57d70fb8d12739dd68fb9dc) by removing those impls.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mrrw-grhq-86gf", "github_reviewed_at": "2023-02-28T20:30:10Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mrrw-grhq-86gf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mrrw-grhq-86gf"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2023-02-28T20:30:10Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tomprogrammer/rust-ascii/issues/64", "https://github.com/tomprogrammer/rust-ascii/pull/63/commits/8a6c7798c202766bd57d70fb8d12739dd68fb9dc", "https://rustsec.org/advisories/RUSTSEC-2023-0015.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mrrw-grhq-86gf"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tomprogrammer/rust-ascii", "summary": "Ascii (crate) allows out-of-bounds array indexing in safe code", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-16T18:56:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mrrw-grhq-86gf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.9.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "ascii"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.7.0, < 0.9.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Ascii (crate) allows out-of-bounds array indexing in safe code
